Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC'S Application for Right to Attach Order And Issuance of Writ Of Attachment is off calendar. The court did not receive a courtesy copy of the filing in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B. In addition, the court has no record of a proof of service.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
